query: SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.positionId, COUNT(pq.id) as question_count FROM position_categories pc LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name, pc.positionId ORDER BY pc.positionId, pc.id LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.positionId, COUNT(pq.id) as question_count FROM position_categories pc LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name, pc.positionId ORDER BY pc.positionId, pc.id LIMIT 30;
